side_effects.description: Burning sensation and itching all over body progressing to near-anaphylactic reaction: difficulty breathing, vomiting, loss of consciousness; required EMT intervention

protocol_notes: Had previously completed a successful cycle of Tirzepatide in March with no issues. Reaction occurred on a subsequent cycle, demonstrating that allergies can develop after prior successful use. Has not used any peptide since the incident a couple months ago.
